gt_sql: SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) FROM (SELECT T1.molecule_id, COUNT(T1.element) AS oxygen_count FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id  WHERE T2.bond_type = '-' AND T1.element = 'o'  GROUP BY T1.molecule_id) AS oxygen_counts
pred_sql:
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS "AVG(oxygen_count)"
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'o' THEN 1 END) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
)
question: Calculate the average number of oxygen atoms in single-bonded molecules.
